project.objective: Where in Spain was Francisco Naveda Somarriba born or baptized, and who were his parents?

questions.question: Who were the parents of Francisco Naveda Somarriba (b. ~1832, Spain; emigrated to Mexico; d. Papantla, Veracruz)?
questions.rationale: Primary objective. Indexed record searches on the surname have failed; his own baptism is not name-indexed, so the parents must be reached through the origin-country parish registers via full-text search.

items.rationale: Indexed surname searches returned only noise and his own baptism is unindexed. Full-text search of the AI-transcribed Cantabrian parish registers on the surname pair should surface the parents' own acts (the child's baptism, a parent's burial or marriage), which name both parents.
